# `polars math sin` for [dataframe](/commands/categories/dataframe.md)

<div class='command-title'>Compute the element-wise sine of a column expression.</div>

## Signature

```> polars math sin {flags} ```


## Input/output types:

| input             | output            |
| ----------------- | ----------------- |
| polars_expression | polars_expression |
| polars_selector   | polars_expression |
## Examples

Compute the element-wise sine of a float column
```nu
> [[a]; [0.0] [1.5707963267948966]] | polars into-df | polars select (polars col a | polars math sin) | polars collect
╭───┬──────╮
│ # │  a   │
├───┼──────┤
│ 0 │ 0.00 │
│ 1 │ 1.00 │
╰───┴──────╯

```
